languages.text: "А предупредить? Все подкрепления у нас отмечены — на кой ляд нам иначе {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g}? {n}Сержант кивает на панель неподалеку и связывается по воксу. После короткого обмена репликами рявкает вам:{/n} "Ну, проходите. Только госпоже Ювенне показаться не забудьте, она ждет вестей про эту вашу Элану".

traits.locale_text: "А предупредить? Все подкрепления у нас отмечены — на кой ляд нам иначе {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g}? {n}Сержант кивает на панель неподалеку и связывается по воксу. После короткого обмена репликами рявкает вам:{/n} "Ну, проходите. Только госпоже Ювенне показаться не забудьте, она ждет вестей про эту вашу Элану".

languages.text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."
languages.original_text: "А предупредить? Все подкрепления у нас отмечены — на кой ляд нам иначе {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g}? {n}Сержант кивает на панель неподалеку и связывается по воксу. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

"What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

languages.text: “怎么没事前通报？我们的援军全都登记在册，不然要这台{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}有什么用？”{n}军士一边朝旁边的面板点头示意，一边对着音阵说了几句。简短交流几句后，他冲你喊道：{/n}“那就进去吧。不过别忘了去见尤文娜女士，她还等着听你那个埃拉娜的消息呢。”
languages.original_text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

traits.locale_text: “怎么没事前通报？我们的援军全都登记在册，不然要这台{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}有什么用？”{n}军士一边朝旁边的面板点头示意，一边对着音阵说了几句。简短交流几句后，他冲你喊道：{/n}“那就进去吧。不过别忘了去见尤文娜女士，她还等着听你那个埃拉娜的消息呢。”

languages.text: « Sans nous prévenir ? Tous les renforts prévus sont notés dans ce {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g}. Il n'est pas là pour faire joli, je vous ferai dire, » {n}déclare le sergent en montrant du menton un panneau à proximité. Il se met ensuite à parler dans son vox et, après un bref échange, il vous lance :{/n} « Allez-y, mais n'oubliez pas de vous présenter à dame Juvenna. Elle attend des nouvelles de cette Elana. »
languages.original_text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

traits.locale_text: « Sans nous prévenir ? Tous les renforts prévus sont notés dans ce {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g}. Il n'est pas là pour faire joli, je vous ferai dire, » {n}déclare le sergent en montrant du menton un panneau à proximité. Il se met ensuite à parler dans son vox et, après un bref échange, il vous lance :{/n} « Allez-y, mais n'oubliez pas de vous présenter à dame Juvenna. Elle attend des nouvelles de cette Elana. »

languages.text: "Peki ya uyarı? Tüm takviye kuvvetlerimiz kayıtlı... Aksi takdirde bu {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayar{/g} ne işe yarar ki?" {n}Çavuş, yakındaki bir paneli başıyla işaret edip voks aracılığıyla konuşuyor. Kısa bir diyalogdan sonra sana dönüyor.{/n} "Devam edin. Kendinizi Leydi Juvenna'ya takdim etmeyi unutmayın, şu sizin Elana'dan haber bekliyor."
languages.original_text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

traits.locale_text: "Peki ya uyarı? Tüm takviye kuvvetlerimiz kayıtlı... Aksi takdirde bu {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayar{/g} ne işe yarar ki?" {n}Çavuş, yakındaki bir paneli başıyla işaret edip voks aracılığıyla konuşuyor. Kısa bir diyalogdan sonra sana dönüyor.{/n} "Devam edin. Kendinizi Leydi Juvenna'ya takdim etmeyi unutmayın, şu sizin Elana'dan haber bekliyor."

languages.text: «¿Y no podían avisar? Llevamos un registro de todos nuestros refuerzos, ¿si no para qué queremos el {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g}?». {n}El sargento asiente en dirección a un panel cercano y habla por el voco. Tras un breve intercambio, se dirige a ti:{/n} «Adelante pues. No olvide presentarse ante lady Juvenna. Está deseosa de recibir noticias de la tal Elana».
languages.original_text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

traits.locale_text: «¿Y no podían avisar? Llevamos un registro de todos nuestros refuerzos, ¿si no para qué queremos el {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g}?». {n}El sargento asiente en dirección a un panel cercano y habla por el voco. Tras un breve intercambio, se dirige a ti:{/n} «Adelante pues. No olvide presentarse ante lady Juvenna. Está deseosa de recibir noticias de la tal Elana».

languages.text: "Wie wäre es mit einer Warnung? Alle unsere Verstärkungen sind protokolliert — welchen Nutzen hätte dieser {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitator{/g} sonst?" {n}Der Sergeant nickt in die Richtung einer Konsole und spricht in sein Vox. Nach einem kurzen Gespräch schnauzt er dich an: {/n} "Gut, Ihr könnt gehen. Vergesst nur nicht, Euch bei Lady Juvenna zu melden. Sie ist schon gespannt, was Ihr über diese Elana zu berichten habt."
languages.original_text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

traits.locale_text: "Wie wäre es mit einer Warnung? Alle unsere Verstärkungen sind protokolliert — welchen Nutzen hätte dieser {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitator{/g} sonst?" {n}Der Sergeant nickt in die Richtung einer Konsole und spricht in sein Vox. Nach einem kurzen Gespräch schnauzt er dich an: {/n} "Gut, Ihr könnt gehen. Vergesst nur nicht, Euch bei Lady Juvenna zu melden. Sie ist schon gespannt, was Ihr über diese Elana zu berichten habt."

languages.text: 「警告を出すのはどうだ？我々の増援は全て記録されている。この{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}コギタータ{/g}はそれ以外に何の役にも立たないだろう」{n}軍曹は近くの盤面を指さし、ボイスに話しかける。短いやり取りの後、彼はあなたに言った。「行くぞ。ただ、エレーナについて報告するのを忘れないでくれ。ジュベナ卿は君の話待っている」{/n}
languages.original_text: "What about a warning? All our reinforcements are logged — what use is this {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} otherwise?" {n}The sergeant nods at a nearby panel and speaks into his vox. After a brief exchange of remarks, he barks to you,{/n} "Go on, then. Just don't forget to present yourself to Lady Juvenna, she's waiting to hear news about this Elana of yours."

traits.locale_text: 「警告を出すのはどうだ？我々の増援は全て記録されている。この{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}コギタータ{/g}はそれ以外に何の役にも立たないだろう」{n}軍曹は近くの盤面を指さし、ボイスに話しかける。短いやり取りの後、彼はあなたに言った。「行くぞ。ただ、エレーナについて報告するのを忘れないでくれ。ジュベナ卿は君の話待っている」{/n}
